title: The Vampire of the Public Bathhouse
overview: A vampire works in a bathhouse in hopes of drinking the virgin blood of its heir Rihito, who worryingly falls in love on his first day of high school.

title: The Unpleasant Vampire
overview: Ranmaru worries he has inadvertently made Aoi interested in Rihito. Rihito chats with Aoi the next day after school, but they soon get into trouble.

title: Franken and the Vampire
overview: After saving Aoi, a hungry Ranmaru tries to resist the urge to feed on her. Rihito soon arrives at the scene and comes to a mistaken realization.

title: The Vampire's Slumber Party
overview: Franken proclaims his admiration for Ranmaru, who tasks him with protecting Rihito. Franken tags along with them back to the Tatsuno house for dinner.

title: The Vampire of Fate
overview: Rihito's teacher Sakamoto — an undercover vampire hunter of notable lineage — learns that his longtime foe Ranmaru lives with the Tatsunos.

title: A Vampire Put on the Spot
overview: As Sakamoto tells Ranmaru the reason for his unexpected request, a puzzled Rihito walks in on them. Ranmaru reveals how Sakamoto's ancestor died.

title: The Cornered Vampire
overview: At the Koi Bathhouse, Franken and Sakamoto attempt to bring their plan to fruition by urging Rihito to tell Aoi how he feels about her.

title: A Gal and the Vampire
overview: Tough girl Kaoru is charmed by Rihito's cuteness, but when she goes to return a handkerchief he lent her, she can't seem to drop her brash attitude.

title: A Certain Family and the Vampire
overview: After a confrontation with Kaoru's father, Ranmaru attempts to drink Kaoru's blood. However, he's repulsed by her makeup — which gives him an idea.

title: Mr. Sakamoto and the Vampire
overview: Sakamoto tells Ranmaru he was attacked by a vampire at the school. After a remedial night class, Franken and Kaoru encounter a boyish-looking vampire.

title: Love, the Cross, and the Vampire
overview: Thoughts of Rihito give Ranmaru strength as he struggles against the formidable Nagayoshi. Suddenly, Kaoru appears with an improvised weapon in hand.

title: And Thus, a New Vampire
overview: Ranmaru asks Rihito's father to let Nagayoshi stay in the apartment behind the bathhouse. A newly inspired Nagayoshi declares he's in love with Kaoru.
